description: Visual inference rules that map observable image features to structured parameters. Each domain defines: (1) what visual cues to look for, (2) how to infer parameter values, and (3) the mapping from coarse category to fine-grained parameters for image generation.

lighting_inference.description: Infer fine-grained lighting parameters from shadow/highlight evidence
visual_cues_priority: shadow edge hardness (sharp vs soft transition)

rules.description: Position of primary light source inferred from shadow cast
rules.cues: Observe where shadows fall relative to the product. Shadow opposite side = light source direction.

inference.condition: shadow cast directly below, minimal side shadow
shadow falls to one side, opposite side bright
shadow soft and under product, secondary highlight opposite
shadow behind product, edges bright
shadow very faint in multiple directions
product brightly lit from below
shadow diagonally behind and to one side
circular highlight in product center

rules.description: Hardness/softness of light inferred from shadow edge quality
rules.cues: Examine the transition zone between shadow and light on the product or surface.

inference.condition: crisp, sharp shadow edge with clear boundary
slightly soft edge, still identifiable shadow boundary
gradual, smooth shadow transition, no clear edge
almost no visible shadow, even illumination
mixed: sharp on near surface, soft cast shadow

rules.description: Number of light sources inferred from highlight/shadow complexity
rules.cues: Count distinct highlight reflections and shadow sets. Multiple shadow directions = multi-light.

inference.condition: single highlight, one shadow direction
one strong highlight + one fill reflection opposite
highlights on both sides + top rim
even illumination with soft shadows from multiple angles
circular highlight ring
main highlight + background accent color

rules.description: Color temperature inferred from white balance and color cast
rules.cues: Look at neutral areas (white background, silver metal, paper) for color tint.

inference.condition: white areas appear blue/cool, shadows blue-tinted
white appears neutral grey, no visible tint
white appears slightly yellow/orange
mixed: one side cool, other side warm
very warm, almost amber shadows
clinical blue-white, shadows slightly cyan

rules.description: How dark and prominent shadows are
rules.cues: Compare shadow area brightness to lit area brightness.

inference.condition: shadows nearly black, high luminance ratio
shadows clearly visible but not pure black
shadows faint, shadow area still detailed
shadows barely detectable
shadows completely absent

rules.description: Overall luminance range inferred from highlight-to-shadow ratio
rules.cues: Look at the brightest highlight vs darkest shadow in frame.

inference.condition: bright white highlights and near-black shadows coexist
highlights bright, shadows dark but textured
moderate range, both ends visible
low range, no pure white or black
everything in mid-tones, very flat

position_inference.description: Infer product position, angle, distance, framing, and perspective from spatial layout
visual_cues_priority: distance between product and frame edge

rules.description: Product rotation relative to camera's optical axis
rules.cues: Which surfaces of the product are visible? Front face + one side = angled. Only front = straight-on.

inference.condition: only front face visible, product parallel to sensor
front + one side visible, slight rotation
front + side equally visible, clear 3D depth
side profile, front barely visible
product seen from side, no front visible
product top visible (overhead or flat lay)
product bottom partially visible (camera below)
product tipped toward camera, top face visible

rules.description: Camera-to-subject distance inferred from context and magnification
rules.cues: How much of the product fills the frame. How much background context is visible.

inference.condition: product fills >80% of frame, edges of product cropped
product fills 50-80% of frame, some background visible
product fills 30-50%, clear background around product
product <30% of frame, lots of environment visible
needle tip or cartridge membrane fills entire frame
product held in hand fills 60-80% of frame

rules.description: How tightly the subject is framed within the image bounds
rules.cues: Distance from product edges to frame edges.

inference.condition: product extends to or beyond frame edge
minimal space (<10% of product width) around product
moderate space (10-30% product width) around product
generous space (>30% product width) around product
product small within vast background

rules.description: Camera height relative to product, affecting perceived scale and drama
rules.cues: Is the camera looking down, straight-on, or up at the product?

inference.condition: camera directly above product, surface as backdrop
camera slightly above, product top visible
camera at product height, no vertical angle distortion
camera slightly below, product appears taller
camera far below, dramatic upward view

material_inference.description: Infer material properties from surface reflection, texture, and light interaction
visual_cues_priority: reflection clarity (mirror vs blurry vs absent)
surface texture visible under direct light
edge behavior (sharp vs softened light absorption)

rules.description: How shiny/reflective the surface appears
rules.cues: Examine light reflection on the surface: sharp bright spot = high specular, diffuse spread = low specular.

inference.condition: tiny bright pinpoint reflection, mirror-like
distinct but soft highlight, surface visible through it
broad soft reflection, no distinct bright spot
no reflection visible, surface appears flat
light passes through material, glows from within

rules.description: Texture granularity of the surface
rules.cues: Look at how light scatters across the surface. Rough = light scatters evenly. Smooth = sharp reflections.

inference.condition: mirror-clear reflection, surface imperceptible
slight texture visible under raking light
visible grain or pattern on surface
coarse, irregular surface, light breaks up
visible parallel scratches or brush marks

rules.description: Primary material class inferred from visual properties
rules.cues: Combine color, reflection, edge sharpness, and texture cues.

inference.condition: sharp highlights, metallic color, high specularity
colored surface with metallic sheen
colored, moderate specular, smooth
colored, low specular, slightly soft appearance
transparent or translucent, see-through
translucent, frosted, light diffuses through
fibrous, matte, absorbent appearance
very dark, matte, with visible grain
soft, wrinkled, skin-like with texture
cushioned, textured, low specular

camera_inference.description: Infer lens type, focal length, and camera technique from optical properties
visual_cues_priority: depth of field (how much is in focus front-to-back)
magnification ratio (how large small objects appear)

rules.description: Inferred 35mm equivalent focal length from perspective and distortion
rules.cues: Wide angle = visible perspective distortion, background appears far. Telephoto = compressed perspective, background appears close.

inference.condition: visible barrel distortion, foreground exaggerated, wide field
natural perspective, moderate field of view, minimal distortion
slight compression, background moderately blurred
strong compression, background very close, distinct bokeh
extreme compression, very narrow angle, flat perspective
extreme close-up with high magnification, tiny object fills frame

rules.description: Inferred aperture from depth of field and background blur
rules.cues: Narrow band of focus = wide aperture. Everything sharp = narrow aperture.

inference.condition: very narrow focus band, only small slice of product sharp
product sharp, background softly blurred
product sharp, background slightly blurred
product and close background sharp
everything sharp front to back
product sharp on black bg, no depth cues

rules.description: Camera stability and movement (for video, infer from still if possible)
rules.cues: For still images: look for tripod-steady = locked down, slight imperfection = handheld.

inference.condition: perfectly level, no rotation, consistent framing
slightly imperfect leveling, natural crop
visible slight tilt or rotation variation
extreme angle or dynamic tilt
phone-captured, square crop typical

composition_inference.description: Infer composition rules and visual weight distribution from frame layout

rules.description: Where the visual attention is concentrated in the frame
rules.cues: Which quadrant draws the eye first? Product size vs background ratio.

inference.condition: product at exact center, equal space all sides
product on left third, negative space on right
product on right third, negative space on left
product at top of frame, lower empty
product at bottom, upper area empty
multiple products spread across frame
product diagonal across frame corner to corner

rules.description: How depth is constructed in the frame
rules.cues: How many visual planes exist? Foreground obstruction, mid-ground subject, background?

inference.condition: only one plane visible (product on flat bg)
product + surface visible, no background
product + surface + wall/background visible
obstruction in foreground + product + background
hand/glove in mid-ground between camera and product

rules.description: Approximate ratio of empty space to subject
rules.cues: Estimate visual area of background vs product.

inference.condition: product fills >80% of frame
product fills 50-80% of frame
product fills 30-50% of frame
product fills <30% of frame

background_inference.description: Infer background material, depth, and treatment from visual cues

rules.description: Material or surface type of the background
rules.cues: Texture, reflectivity, and pattern of the background surface.

inference.condition: no texture visible, pure black, no depth
no texture visible, pure white, bright
subtle linear texture, slight paper grain
hard surface with faint reflection, scratchable
visible wood grain, warm brown tones
cold surface, metallic sheen, parallel grain
soft fabric texture, no reflection
hard surface, visible reflection of product
irregular texture, small bumps
blurred shapes, no identifiable surface

rules.description: Distance from product to background surface
rules.cues: Shadow sharpness on background, blur level, parallax.

inference.condition: product shadow falls directly on bg, bg in focus
product shadow soft on bg, bg slightly soft
bg completely out of focus, no shadow visible
no bg visible (black/white seamless, product floating)

product_identification_rules.description: Visual rules to identify tattoo supply products from image features alone — fills gaps where keywords are insufficient

primary_visual_indicators: small transparent/translucent cylinder with metal tip
visible needle point protruding from one end
colored O-ring at base (brand color coding)
arranged in tray or packaging with individual slots
metal tip with visible bevel/grind marks

distinguish_from.needle_pack: cartridges have colored plastic housing + O-ring + membrane. Needle packs are just needles in paper/plastic wrap.
distinguish_from.grip: cartridges are smaller (2-3cm), have exposed needle tip. Grips are longer hollow tubes (8-12cm).
distinguish_from.machine_part: cartridges attach to machine. They are the disposable tip, not the main body.

primary_visual_indicators: RCA connector or USB port at bottom

distinguish_from.grip: machines are complete units with electronics, grips are just handle attachments without electronics
distinguish_from.battery: machines have needle bars/cartridge attachment. Batteries are purely cylindrical with contacts.
distinguish_from.power_supply: machines are handheld. Power supplies are desktop units with cables and displays.

primary_visual_indicators: cylindrical tube, slightly shorter than machine
OLED display showing battery level or voltage
button on body (single power or +/- adjustment)
metal contact pins at one or both ends

distinguish_from.tattoo_machine: batteries have no cartridge holder, no needle bar movement. Pure cylinder with contacts.
distinguish_from.machine_grip: batteries have electronics (screen/button). Grips are passive mechanical tubes.

primary_visual_indicators: colored liquid visible (black most common, also white, colored)
label with brand and color name
ink cap or ink cup nearby (small plastic cups)
pigment settled at bottom (for some colors)

distinguish_from.aftercare_product: ink bottles are smaller, have colored liquid. Aftercare is opaque cream in tubes/jars.
distinguish_from.cleaning_supply: ink bottles concentrate on pigment color names. Cleaning supplies have disinfectant labels.

primary_visual_indicators: textured exterior surface (diamond, groove, or knurling)
sold individually or in grip sets with different textures/colors

distinguish_from.tattoo_machine: grips are simple hollow tubes with no electronics, no cable port
distinguish_from.cartridge: grips are much larger (fits in hand), no needle point

primary_visual_indicators: RCA or clip cord output cable

distinguish_from.wireless_battery: power supplies are larger, sit on desk, have wall power cord. Batteries are handheld, attach to machine.

primary_visual_indicators: tube, jar, or bottle with cream/lotion
pump bottle or squeeze tube format
second skin / protective film in box or on backing paper

distinguish_from.tattoo_ink: aftercare containers are opaque, hold cream not liquid. Labels say 'healing' not color names.
distinguish_from.cleaning_supply: aftercare is for healing (post-tattoo). Cleaning is for prep (pre-tattoo).

primary_visual_indicators: hectograph purple color on transfer surface
paper sheets with cover sheet interleaving

distinguish_from.needle_pack: stencil paper is flat sheets, not needle packaging
distinguish_from.paper_towel: stencil paper has carbon coating and specific purple/blue color

primary_visual_indicators: glove cuff visible at box opening
individual gloves pulled from box opening

distinguish_from.medical_supply: tattoo gloves are typically black nitrile, not blue/white examination gloves

distinguish_from.aftercare_product: cleaning products are for surface/tool disinfection, not skin healing
distinguish_from.tattoo_ink: cleaning products are clear or green soap, not tattoo pigments

primary_visual_indicators: multiple items arranged together in one frame
kit packaging or box containing varied items
starter kit with machine + cartridges + ink + accessories

distinguish_from.individual_product: kits have 3+ different product types visibly grouped together

primary_visual_indicators: box or display case as main subject
foam insert with cutouts for products

distinguish_from.bundle_kit: packaging focuses on the container/display. Kit focuses on the contents.

primary_visual_indicators: paper-plastic peel pack with sterile seal
arranged in fan or row for display

distinguish_from.tattoo_cartridges: needle packs are flat peel pouches. Cartridges have 3D plastic housing.
distinguish_from.stencil_paper: needle packs are individual pouches. Stencil paper is larger flat sheets.

generation_prompt_assembly.description: Rules for assembling the fine-grained analysis into actual image generation prompt keywords
prompt_structure_order: position and angle (product_angle + distance + framing + perspective)

quality_modifiers.prefix: professional studio photography, high-end product shoot,
